summary: Completed comprehensive security testing for TheCryptoCoach.io. All 20 security tests pass. Security hardening features are working correctly: rate limiting, brute force protection, input sanitization, XSS/NoSQL injection detection, security headers, password strength validation, and audit logging.
critical_code_review_comments: Security implementation is solid - all major attack vectors are covered
Rate limiting uses in-memory storage (slowapi default) - consider Redis for production multi-instance deployments
Brute force protection uses in-memory storage - will reset on server restart. Consider persisting to MongoDB for production
seed_data_creation: None - used existing admin account for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening is complete and tested. Rate limiting is aggressive (5/min login, 3/min register). Test IP may get blocked during testing - wait 15 minutes for lockout to expire.

brute_force_protection.failed_login_tracking: PASS - Tracks failed attempts by IP and email

input_sanitization.xss_script_tags: PASS - Blocked in registration name field

password_strength.complexity: PASS - Requires 3 of 4: uppercase, lowercase, digit, special

admin_security_dashboard.returns_data: PASS - Returns security status for admin

audit_logging.logged_events: Failed logins, successful logins, rate limit exceeded, suspicious paths, injection attempts, admin actions

events_captured: SUCCESSFUL LOGIN with IP and role

mocked_apis.note: All security features are real implementations
